definition: Abbreviation of Japan: a country in East Asia (NATO country code).
definitions: Abbreviation of Japan: a country in East Asia (NATO country code).

definition: A quick stab or blow; a poking or thrusting motion.
definitions: A quick stab or blow; a poking or thrusting motion.

definition: A coarse medieval coat of defence, especially one made of leather.
definitions: A coarse medieval coat of defence, especially one made of leather.

definitions: A piece of clothing worn on the upper body outside a shirt or blouse, often waist length to thigh length.

definition: A money prize pool which accumulates until the conditions are met for it to be won.
definitions: A money prize pool which accumulates until the conditions are met for it to be won.

definition: Unevenly cut; having the texture of something so cut.
definitions: Unevenly cut; having the texture of something so cut.

definition: A place or institution for the confinement of persons held against their will in lawful custody or detention, especially (in US usage) a place where people are held for minor offenses or with reference to some future judicial proceeding.
definitions: A place or institution for the confinement of persons held against their will in lawful custody or detention, especially (in US usage) a place where people are held for minor offenses or with reference to some future judicial proceeding.

definition: A sweet mixture of fruit boiled with sugar and allowed to congeal. Often spread on bread or toast or used in jam tarts
definitions: A sweet mixture of fruit boiled with sugar and allowed to congeal. Often spread on bread or toast or used in jam tarts

definition: Someone who looks after the maintenance and cleaning of a public building.
definitions: Someone who looks after the maintenance and cleaning of a public building.

definition: The first month of the Gregorian calendar, following the December of the previous year and preceding February.
definitions: The first month of the Gregorian calendar, following the December of the previous year and preceding February.

definition: A kind of almond meringue dessert.
definitions: A kind of almond meringue dessert.

definition: An earthenware container, either with two or no handles, for holding oil, water, wine, etc., or used for burial.
definitions: An earthenware container, either with two or no handles, for holding oil, water, wine, etc., or used for burial.

definition: The inclusions and fissures within an emerald.
definitions: The inclusions and fissures within an emerald.

definition: A technical terminology unique to a particular subject.
definitions: A technical terminology unique to a particular subject.
A language characteristic of a particular group.

definition: A light spear thrown with the hand and used as a weapon.
definitions: A light spear thrown with the hand and used as a weapon.

definition: One of the bones, usually bearing teeth, which form the framework of the mouth.
definitions: One of the bones, usually bearing teeth, which form the framework of the mouth.

definition: Any of the numerous species of birds belonging to several genera within the family Corvidae, including Garrulus, Cyanocitta, Aphelocoma, Perisoreus, Cyanocorax, Gymnorhinus, Cyanolyca, Ptilostomus, and Calocitta, allied to the crows, but smaller, more graceful in form, often handsomely coloured, usually having a crest, and often noisy.
definitions: Any of the numerous species of birds belonging to several genera within the family Corvidae, including Garrulus, Cyanocitta, Aphelocoma, Perisoreus, Cyanocorax, Gymnorhinus, Cyanolyca, Ptilostomus, and Calocitta, allied to the crows, but smaller, more graceful in form, often handsomely coloured, usually having a crest, and often noisy.
Any of various other birds of similar appearance and behaviour.

definition: A musical art form rooted in West African cultural and musical expression and in the African American blues tradition, with diverse influences over time, commonly characterized by blue notes, syncopation, swing, call and response, polyrhythms and improvisation.
definitions: A musical art form rooted in West African cultural and musical expression and in the African American blues tradition, with diverse influences over time, commonly characterized by blue notes, syncopation, swing, call and response, polyrhythms and improvisation.
A hypothetical intermediate stage in the development of the Torah, consisting of a combination of the Jehovist (J) and Elohist (E) sources.

definition: Suspecting rivalry in love; troubled by worries that one might have been replaced in someone's affections; suspicious of a lover's or spouse's fidelity.
definitions: Suspecting rivalry in love; troubled by worries that one might have been replaced in someone's affections; suspicious of a lover's or spouse's fidelity.
Protective; zealously guarding; careful in the protection of something (or someone) one has or appreciates, especially one's spouse or lover.

definition: A state of being jealous; a jealous attitude.
definitions: A state of being jealous; a jealous attitude.

definition: A pair of trousers made from denim cotton.
definitions: A pair of trousers made from denim cotton.

definition: A vehicle (of a particular brand) suitable for rough terrain.
definitions: A vehicle (of a particular brand) suitable for rough terrain.

definitions: An officer with political influence; a head or chief in government, such as a sheriff, particularly where that person is Hispanic or of Mexican descent.

definitions: A dessert made by boiling gelatine (or a plant-based alternative such as agar or carrageenan), sugar and some flavouring (often derived from fruit) and allowing it to set.

definition: An almost transparent aquatic animal; any one of the acalephs, especially one of the larger species, having a jellylike appearance.
definitions: An almost transparent aquatic animal; any one of the acalephs, especially one of the larger species, having a jellylike appearance.

Any of various species of cnidarians in the subphylum Medusozoa, including box jellyfish (class Cubozoa), true jellyfish (class Scyphozoa), stalked jellyfish (class Staurozoa), and certain hydrozoans.

definition: To put in jeopardy, to threaten.
definitions: To put in jeopardy, to threaten.

definition: Danger of failure, harm, or loss.
definitions: Danger of failure, harm, or loss.

definitions: A sudden, often uncontrolled movement, especially of the human body.

definitions: An act performed for amusement; a joke.

definition: A person whose job is making, repairing or selling jewelry.
definitions: A person whose job is making, repairing or selling jewelry.

definitions: A power saw with fine teeth and a narrow blade which can cut curves in wood or metal.

definitions: The sound of metal or glass clattering against itself.

definition: An energetic trot, slower than a run, often used as a form of exercise.
definitions: An energetic trot, slower than a run, often used as a form of exercise.

definition: A diminutive of the male given name Joseph.
definitions: A diminutive of the male given name Joseph.
A diminutive of the female given name Josephine.

definition: To connect or combine into one; to put together.
definitions: To connect or combine into one; to put together.
Done by two or more people or organisations working together.

definition: A female given name from French.
definitions: A female given name from French.

definition: Full of merriment and high spirits; jovial; joyous; merry.
definitions: Full of merriment and high spirits; jovial; joyous; merry.

definition: To push or shake abruptly and roughly.
definitions: To push or shake abruptly and roughly.

definition: To bump into or brush against while in motion; to push aside.
definitions: To bump into or brush against while in motion; to push aside.

definition: The smallest letter or stroke of any writing; an iota.
definitions: The smallest letter or stroke of any writing; an iota.

definition: Abbreviation of journeyman, e.g. jour printer.
definitions: Abbreviation of journeyman, e.g. jour printer.

definition: A diary or daily record of a person, organization, vessel etc.; daybook.
definitions: A diary or daily record of a person, organization, vessel etc.; daybook.

definition: The aggregating, writing, editing, and presenting of news or news articles for widespread distribution, typically in electronic publications, broadcast news media, or printed newspapers or periodicals, for the purpose of informing the audience, relying on a style of writing characteristic for this purpose, consisting of direct presentation of facts or events and (depending on type) either with or without analysis or interpretation.
definitions: The aggregating, writing, editing, and presenting of news or news articles for widespread distribution, typically in electronic publications, broadcast news media, or printed newspapers or periodicals, for the purpose of informing the audience, relying on a style of writing characteristic for this purpose, consisting of direct presentation of facts or events and (depending on type) either with or without analysis or interpretation.

definition: The keeper of a personal journal, who writes in it regularly.
definitions: The keeper of a personal journal, who writes in it regularly.

definitions: A set amount of travelling, seen as a single unit; a discrete trip, a voyage.

definition: A feeling of extreme happiness or cheerfulness, especially related to the acquisition or expectation of something good.
definitions: A feeling of extreme happiness or cheerfulness, especially related to the acquisition or expectation of something good.

definition: A special year of emancipation supposed to be observed every fifty years, when farming was temporarily stopped, certain houses and land which had been sold could be redeemed by the original owners or their relatives, and Hebrew slaves set free.
definitions: A special year of emancipation supposed to be observed every fifty years, when farming was temporarily stopped, certain houses and land which had been sold could be redeemed by the original owners or their relatives, and Hebrew slaves set free.

definitions: A public official whose duty it is to administer the law, especially by presiding over trials and rendering judgments; a justice.

definitions: Of or relating to the administration of justice.

definition: Having, characterized by, or done with good judgment or sound thinking.
definitions: Having, characterized by, or done with good judgment or sound thinking.

definition: A liquid made from plant, especially fruit.
definitions: A liquid made from plant, especially fruit.

definitions: The seventh month of the Gregorian calendar, following June and preceding August.

definitions: To propel oneself rapidly upward, downward and/or in any horizontal direction such that momentum causes the body to become airborne.

definitions: Someone or something that jumps, e.g. a participant in a jumping event in track or skiing.
A person who attempts suicide by jumping from a great height.

definition: The act of joining, or the state of being joined.
definitions: The act of joining, or the state of being joined.

definitions: The sixth month of the Gregorian calendar, following May and preceding July, containing the northern solstice.

definitions: Alternative form of djong (‚Äútype of sailing ship‚ÄĚ).

definitions: A large, undeveloped, humid forest, especially in a tropical region, that is home to many wild plants and animals; a tropical rainforest.

definition: Low in rank; having a subordinate role, job, or situation.
definitions: Low in rank; having a subordinate role, job, or situation.

definition: Miscellaneous items of little value, especially discarded or unwanted items.
definitions: Miscellaneous items of little value, especially discarded or unwanted items.

definitions: The ruling council of a military dictatorship.

definitions: The power, right, or authority to interpret and apply the law.

definitions: A group of individuals chosen from the general population to hear and decide a case in a court of law.

definition: The juices given off as meat is cooked.
definitions: The juices given off as meat is cooked.

definition: The state or characteristic of being just or fair.
definitions: The state or characteristic of being just or fair.
The ideal of fairness, impartiality, etc., especially with regard to the punishment of wrongdoing.

Describing an illegal and intentional act that is nevertheless not blameworthy, for example because its positive consequences outweighed the bad. Distinguished from excusable, describing an involuntary illegal act.

definitions: A reason, explanation, or excuse which someone believes provides convincing, morally acceptable support for behavior or for a belief or occurrence.

definitions: To provide an acceptable explanation for.

definitions: The nearness of objects with little or no delimiter.
